subjects.description: A pedestrian standing at the roadside, a middle-aged man wearing a white short-sleeve t-shirt prominently printed with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic on the chest. He wears dark blue jeans and brown casual shoes.
subjects.appearance_details: The stop sign graphic on his shirt is vivid red with bold white 'STOP' lettering, clearly legible and centered on the front of the shirt. He has a short-trimmed beard and wears a black digital wristwatch on his left wrist.
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian is the primary obstacle the ego vehicle is approaching; he stands facing the oncoming car.
subjects.location: Center of frame, initially in the distance and growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium within frame by the end
subjects.orientation: Facing directly toward the camera (ego vehicle)
subjects.pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides, feet shoulder-width apart on the curb edge
subjects.action: Standing still at the edge of the road, facing the approaching ego vehicle
subjects.state_changes: Grows progressively larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches; remains stationary throughout
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt with a large red stop sign graphic on the front, dark blue straight-leg jeans, brown leather casual shoes, black digital wristwatch
subjects.expression: Neutral, calm expression with slight alertness, eyes directed toward the approaching vehicle
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light olive skin with slight weathering, visible stubble shadow on jaw
subjects.facial_features: Brown eyes, short dark brown hair with flecks of gray at the temples, trimmed beard, slightly broad nose, thin lips, faint crow's feet around the eyes

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself is implied through the dashcam/driver perspective; visible elements include the lower edge of the vehicle's hood — a dark gray metallic car hood subtly visible at the bottom of the frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Slight reflections on the hood surface, windshield frame edges barely visible at the periphery of the shot
subjects.relationship: The ego vehicle is the viewer's point of reference, approaching the pedestrian
subjects.location: Bottom edge of frame (hood visible), perspective originates from behind the windshield
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame (occupies bottom edge as reference)
subjects.orientation: Facing forward along the road toward the pedestrian
subjects.action: Driving forward along the urban road, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.state_changes: Vehicle transitions from moderate forward speed to gradual deceleration to a full stop

background_setting: A two-lane urban road lined with a mix of low-rise commercial and residential buildings. Sidewalks with concrete curbs run along both sides. A few parked cars are visible along the right side. Sparse urban trees with green foliage dot the sidewalk. Street lamps and utility poles are present. The road surface is gray asphalt with faded white lane markings. In the distance, a traffic light and additional buildings are visible. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue.

lighting.conditions: Bright daylight with partly cloudy sky, natural sunlight providing strong ambient illumination
lighting.direction: Front-lit to slightly top-lit, with sun positioned high and slightly ahead, casting light onto the road and the pedestrian's front
lighting.shadows: Moderate shadows cast by buildings on the left side of the road; the pedestrian casts a short shadow behind and to his right on the sidewalk; the vehicle's hood shows soft reflected highlights
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, natural daylight gives the scene a realistic, grounded urban feel with good visibility and natural contrast

aesthetics.composition: First-person ego/dashcam perspective with the road receding to a central vanishing point; the pedestrian is centered along the road's trajectory, creating strong focal alignment; the hood of the car anchors the lower frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Gray asphalt road, muted earth-toned buildings in beige and light brown, green foliage accents, dominant vivid red of the stop sign on the pedestrian's shirt standing out against the urban palette, blue sky with white clouds
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, cautious, realistic urban driving scenario with a sense of alertness and anticipation
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating vertical lines of utility poles and street lamps along the roadside; evenly spaced parked cars

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot that gradually decelerates; the camera moves steadily forward along the road, slowing down in the latter half and coming to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from a dashcam/ego vehicle perspective, capturing the full width of the road and surroundings
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level from approximately dashboard/windshield height of a sedan, slightly above road surface
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the pedestrian and the road ahead; background buildings slightly softer but still legible
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Standard ~35mm equivalent, consistent with a typical dashcam or driver's eye perspective

artistic_style: Realistic, dashcam documentary style with cinematic clarity
context: An autonomous driving or road safety scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle's reaction to a pedestrian displaying a stop sign on their clothing, used for illustrating perception and braking behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at moderate speed along the urban road; in the distance, a small figure of a pedestrian is visible standing on the right curb ahead.
The vehicle continues forward and the pedestrian becomes more clearly visible; the red stop sign graphic on his white shirt becomes distinguishable as the distance closes.

The ego vehicle begins to decelerate noticeably; the pedestrian grows larger in frame as the vehicle slows progressively and comes to a complete stop approximately 3-4 meters from the pedestrian. The stop sign on the shirt is now clearly legible. The vehicle remains stationary for the final moments.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase sans-serif letters centered within a red octagonal stop sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's white t-shirt; the sign is approximately 25 cm across on the shirt
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Centered on the pedestrian's chest, visible from approximately 0:02 onward as the vehicle closes distance, becoming fully legible by 0:03-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign image printed on the pedestrian's shirt, serving as a visual cue that mimics a real traffic stop sign and prompts the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives at a steady moderate speed along the urban road. The road stretches ahead with buildings on both sides, and a small figure of the pedestrian is barely visible in the distance on the right side of the road.
segments.key_changes: Road environment established; pedestrian appears as a distant figure
segments.camera: Steady forward tracking at consistent speed, dashcam-level perspective

segments.description: The vehicle continues approaching; the pedestrian becomes increasingly visible and recognizable. The red stop sign graphic on his white shirt begins to stand out. The vehicle starts to slow slightly near the end of this segment.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian grows from small to medium in frame; stop sign on shirt becomes distinguishable; vehicle speed begins to decrease
segments.camera: Forward tracking shot with subtle speed reduction beginning, maintaining eye-level dashcam angle

segments.description: The ego vehicle decelerates significantly and comes to a full stop a few meters in front of the pedestrian. The pedestrian stands calmly facing the vehicle, his stop sign shirt now prominently visible and fully legible. The scene holds as the car is fully stopped.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle transitions from slow movement to complete stop; the 'STOP' text on the shirt is clearly readable; the scene becomes static as the vehicle rests
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerates to stationary; camera settles to a still dashcam view as the vehicle stops

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the video begins from the ego perspective of a car driving at moderate speed along a sunlit urban road flanked by low-rise buildings, parked cars, and scattered trees. At around 0:01 a small figure of a pedestrian becomes visible ahead standing on the right curb. Between 0:01 and 0:02 the car continues forward and the pedestrian grows in the frame, revealing a white t-shirt with something red on it. By 0:02-0:03 the stop sign graphic on the pedestrian's shirt becomes clearly distinguishable as the vehicle begins to slow down. From 0:03 onward the vehicle decelerates noticeably, the braking smooth and progressive. By 0:04 the bold white 'STOP' text inside the red octagon on the man's shirt is fully legible. The car comes to a complete stop by approximately 0:04, resting a few meters from the pedestrian. From 0:04 to 0:05 the vehicle remains stationary, the pedestrian standing calmly with a neutral expression facing the stopped car, the stop sign shirt prominently displayed.
audio_description: The audio begins with the low steady hum of a car engine and the soft sound of tires rolling on asphalt. Faint ambient urban sounds are present — distant traffic, a subtle breeze. Around 0:03, the sound of the engine note dropping is audible as the vehicle decelerates, accompanied by a gentle braking sound. By 0:04-0:05, the engine idles quietly and the ambient urban soundscape is more prominent — a distant car horn, birds chirping faintly, the rustle of tree leaves.
